title: CosmoRP Legacy
body:
## This resourcepack made specially for the server and Roleplay. ***For normal work of the pack you need to install Optifine*** How to install **VERY IMPORTANT**: 1. Download the version you want. 2. Open .zip 3. Make folder named like .zip archive was. 4. Put all files from .zip into this folder. 5. Put folder in /.minecraft/resourcepacks folder. 6. Done! ---- There's a lot of some decorations, items and vanilla overhauls, that will do the best gameplay in the Roleplay servers! For getting the custom item you need to rename it with a special name and add in the end > crp ### You also need a list of names and items that you need to rename:
List of Items (click me)

Any potion: - Синяя Банка | Blue Can Any dye(Purple, Red, Yellow, White, Black): - Открытый Спрей | Opened Spray - Спрей | Spray Iron sword: - Старинный Меч | Ancient Sword Spyglass: - Рупор | Megaphone Chest: - Торговый Автомат | Soda Machine Candle: - Свеча на Подставке | Candle On A Metal Iron ingot: - Поднос | Tray - Мужской | Men - Женский | Women Netherite: - Костёр | Blaze Burner Shulkers(color variated): - Кейс | Toolbox Oak planks: - Деревянный стол | CSS Table Carved Pumpkins: - Роутер | Router - Шляпа Паровозника | Train Hat - Гробница | Gravestone Cactus: - Мусорная Корзина | Cafe Bin - Мусорное Ведро | Street Bin Observer: - Камера | Old Camera - Кинематографическая Камера | VHS Camera Bedrock: - Космо-Плакат | Cosmo Cosmetics Sign Iron bars: - Металлический Забор | Metal Fence Rabbit stew: - Бобы | Beans Bread: - Вафли | Waffles Red wool: - Кресло | Chair Spruce planks: - Скамейка | Park Bench Scaffolding: - Пляжное Кресло | Beach Chair - Стремянка | Ladder Sculk sensor: - Рация | VHS Radio Paper: - Листы Бумаги | Stack of Papers Book: - Стопка Книг | Book Stack Glass: - Археологическая Рамка | Archaeology Frame - Археологическая Рамка 2 (with glass) | Archaeology Frame 2 Gold block: - gold trophy Blue Carpet: - Космо-Ковёр | Cosmo Rug Crafting table: - Стол Инженера | Engineer's Table Amethyst (any): - Кристалл на Подставке | Crystal Plate Clock: - Старинные Часы | Grandfather Clock Note block: - Граммофон | Jukebox - Радио | Radio - Califone CAS1500 - Бумбокс | VHS Boombox Hopper: - Califone CAS1500 Stick: - Микрофон | Microphone Bucket: - Синяя Ваза | Blue Pot - Большой Кувшин | Big Pot - Керамическая Ваза | Ceramic Pot - Рыжий Мох | Orange Moss Milk Bucket: - Молочная Ваза | Milk Pot - Керамическая Ваза | Ceramic Pot Bucket (any): - Белая Ваза (and 2,3,4) | White Pot (and 2,3,4) - Коричневая Ваза | Loot Pot - Маленькая Коричневая Ваза | Mini Loot Pot Netherite items: - Космический Жезл | Cosmo Cane Diamond items: - Посох Ветра | Wind Trident *There also a secret models, but Shhh...!*
